---
title: "Tools"
page-layout: full
description: "Interactive decision-support and economic-evaluation tools developed by Mesfin Genie."
---

::: {.page-header}
::: {.page-shell}
# Tools

Interactive decision-support and economic-evaluation applications.
:::
:::

::: {.section}
::: {.page-shell}
::: {.tool-page-grid}
::: {.tool-page-card}
<div class="tool-topline"><span>Vaccine policy · Version 18</span><span class="live-pill">Live</span></div>

## eMANDEVA Decision Aid

Evaluates prospective vaccine-mandate designs using expected public support, lives saved, benefit-cost outcomes and policy trade-offs.

::: {.tool-tags}
[Public support]{.tool-tag}
[Lives saved]{.tool-tag}
[Benefit–cost analysis]{.tool-tag}
[Policy scenarios]{.tool-tag}
:::

[Launch eMANDEVA ↗](https://mesfingenie.com/eMANDEVA-DecisionAid-V18/){.button-primary target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.tool-page-card}
<div class="tool-topline"><span>Farm economics · Version 18</span><span class="live-pill">Live</span></div>

## Farming BCA Tool

Evaluates farm practices and soil-management interventions under alternative assumptions and sensitivity scenarios.

::: {.tool-tags}
[Net present value]{.tool-tag}
[Benefit–cost ratio]{.tool-tag}
[Return on investment]{.tool-tag}
[Sensitivity analysis]{.tool-tag}
:::

[Launch Farming BCA Tool ↗](https://mesfingenie.com/farming-bca-tool-v18/){.button-primary target="_blank"}
:::
:::
:::
:::
